description: E1 corpus: app-creation requests for schema-generation reliability. Fields: id, lang, category, difficulty (simple = flat fields; moderate = enum/date/view semantics; complex = recurrence, conditional visibility, relations), prompt (verbatim user request).

prompts.prompt: I want to keep a list of books I've read — title, author, when I finished it, and a short note about what I thought.
Help me track my houseplants: name, where it sits, and when I last watered it.
I need a gift idea list for my family — who it's for, the idea, roughly how much it costs, and whether I already bought it.
Track my job applications: company, role, and the stage each one is in — applied, phone screen, onsite, offer, rejected. I want to see it as a board.
Keep a list of my upcoming trips with destination, departure and return dates, and booking status. Show them on a calendar.
A workout log: date, type of exercise (run, swim, weights, yoga), duration in minutes, and how I felt afterwards.
Track my subscriptions — service name, monthly cost in dollars, renewal date — and remind me three days before each renewal. When I mark one as paid, set up the next month's renewal automatically.
My mother needs a medication list: name, dose, and the next refill date. Remind us a week before a refill is due, and when a refill is marked done, schedule the next one 30 days later.
A wine cellar list: name, vintage year, region, price, and whether we've opened it. Only ask for a rating once a bottle has been opened.

I have a client list already. Now I want an invoices tracker where each invoice points at one of my clients, with amount, issue date, due date, and paid/unpaid status. Remind me when an invoice is overdue.
A recipe box: dish name, cuisine, ingredients as a list I can add rows to, cooking time, and a photo.
A household chores rota — chore, who does it, how often (weekly or monthly), when it's next due. When someone marks a chore done, roll it forward to the next occurrence.
英単語の練習帳を作って。単語、意味、例文、覚えたかどうかのチェックが欲しい。
毎日の体重を記録したい。日付、体重、メモだけのシンプルなものでいい。
保険の一覧を管理したい。保険会社、種類、年間保険料、次回の支払日。支払日の2週間前に知らせて、支払済みにしたら翌年の支払日を自動で作ってほしい。
子供の学校行事を管理したい。行事名、日付、準備するもの、状態(未準備・準備中・完了)。ボードで見たい。
カラオケの持ち歌リスト。曲名、歌手、キー調整、最後に歌った日、得意かどうか。
お歳暮の管理。贈り先の一覧は連絡先にあるので、それを参照して、年、品物、金額、送付済みかどうかを記録したい。
Make me something to organize my life.

I want a home inventory system: every item in my house with name, room, category, purchase date, price, current estimated value, warranty expiration with a reminder 30 days before, serial number, a photo, receipts as file attachments, condition rating from 1 to 5, whether it's insured, notes, and a link to the manual.
Track my daily mood as a number from 1 to 10, and show me a kanban board organized by the date.
Write me a poem about databases.
Just a simple packing checklist for travel.
フリーランスの収入記録。クライアント名、金額(円)、受領日、源泉徴収があったかどうか。
